author: Isabel Mace
review: We recently started renting with Dwell and it has been such an easy and nice experience. We have had a few issues with lights and such which is to be expected in brand new construction and they have very quickly come to help us figure out

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the feedback Isabel, we have really enjoyed getting to serve you with a higher level of service.

author: carleeeyyy c
review: Dwell was great to work with in leasing a townhome! Kolton is a very responsive & knowledgeable property manager, always willing to offer help when needed! Their platform for the residence is a breeze to use & paying rent is very easy.

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate the feedback Carley, we try our best to create a seamless leasing process. We look forward to serving you more in the future!

author: Jesse Gilbert
review: Definitely the best property manager I have used in Bellingham. They have been approachable and easy to work with! Highly recommend.

author: Elyssa Kuik
review: We've had a great experience with Dwell! Kolton went above and beyond to have everything ready for our move-in on short notice, and responds quickly and kindly to any questions we have.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Elyssa. We've made it a priority to provide quick response times and believe communication is a key factor to our business. We appreciate the kind review and are thankful for the opportunity to serve you.

author: Ty Rawls
review: My wife and I have had awesome experience doing business with them. The Dwell team are super friendly and helpful and care for their clients! Would highly recommend! Thank you for everything you guys do.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the kind words Ty, we have really enjoyed getting to serve you and your wife!!

author: Andrew Ziegenfus
review: Dwell is a fantastic management company. As a vendor, they treat us with respect and are very reasonable. We look forward to continuing to work together.

author: Jonathan LeBlanc
review: We recently began renting a townhouse managed by Dwell and are very impressed! This unit was brand new but there were a few minor issues we found during the walkthrough, Dwell was quick to respond and resolve these issues. They are friendly, helpful, and have made our move one of the easiest yet!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much Jon for the positive feedback. We look forward to serving you with an unmatched level of service.

author: Karly Gilgen
review:
I absolutely love this company! SUCH AN EASY PROCESS! Moving has literally never been so easy.
100000000% recommend them if you need to rent a place to live or if you need to rent out your own place.

author: Karen L
review: Responsive, friendly and great to rent from. Been tenant with them since 2022, Kolton is awesome.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks Karen, weve really enjoyed serving you!
